title: Intensely Smoky Italian Epoisses Pasta
description: A smoky and savory Italian dish featuring epoisses cheese and a miso marinade, this pasta is a quick fix for a weeknight dinner. It is halal-friendly and made with simple ingredients.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle pasta according to the package instructions.
In a small bowl, whisk together the miso paste, olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
In a large skillet, heat the marinade over medium heat and add the halved cherry tomatoes.
Cook the cherry tomatoes for 3-4 minutes or until they start to release their juices.
Add the crumbly epoisses cheese to the skillet and stir until it starts to melt and combine with the cherry tomatoes.
Drain the cooked pappardelle pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing everything together to combine.
Season with additional salt and black pepper if needed.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top with chopped fresh parsley.
